metadata.description: Super-dataset of hand-crafted full-week scenarios. Each carries multimodal weekly inputs, cross-domain bridges, Socratic questions, and a generated priority list. Used by Empiricum mirror, Today's Brief, and the Omnilattice expansion pipeline.

schema.safety_applied: optional object · only for under-16 entries

scenarios.title: Decomposition is the load-bearing skill across CS, gymnastics, and public speaking
scenarios.situation: A 19-year-old UG student in Chennai walks through a week of college classes (CS decomposition · English public speaking · business trading game · violin · gymnastics) plus a witnessed car crash, a family-trip Bezos-email story, a cash-vs-card gift purchase, and a stranger argument handled with English-class tone modulation.

week_inputs.cs_class: Decomposition: break complex systems into smaller manageable ones. Professor drew hierarchy diagram.
week_inputs.english_class: Tone modulation: 1-on-1 vs small group vs auditorium. Slang warnings. Pronunciation drift.
week_inputs.business_game: Skittles trade game. Teacher took 1 candy per trade, no competition needed. Hidden middleman economics revealed.
week_inputs.violin: Chord progressions. Mastery via deliberate repetition. Emotional resonance of minor keys.
week_inputs.real_world: Witnessed car crash near campus. Low maintenance + delayed reaction = collision.
week_inputs.family_trip: Uncle described Bezos's 'birth of AWS' email. Strategic email → infrastructure decade.
week_inputs.purchase: Bought gift in cash, not card. Avoided 2% transaction fee. Applied business-class insight.
week_inputs.argument: Stranger argued. Used English-class tone modulation. Outcome positive.

ai_synthesis.detected_pattern: Decomposition is the load-bearing meta-skill across CS, public speaking, gymnastics, and risk assessment.

cross_domain_solutions.solution: Break each gymnastics routine the way CS breaks algorithms — atomic units, then composition.
Adjust speaking tone the way a function adjusts its signature per caller.
Every car-maintenance skip is a hidden 'transaction fee' on future safety. Recognise both.
Practice violin the way Munger inverts: ask 'what makes me play worse,' eliminate that first.

questions_to_ask: What was the plan when you sat in the violin class — focus, technique, or repetition?
How could the Bezos email idea apply to your project proposal due Friday?
Among the gift purchase, the gym session, and the violin practice, which one compounds the most?
Yesterday you said the car crash spooked you — is your own bike maintained?
Where in your day did you act like an FBI investigator (slow, evidence-first)? Where did you act like a startled bird?
priority_list: Pre-mortem the project proposal — what's the worst review you could get?
Apply decomposition to the proposal: break it into 4 atomic units.
Practice violin 20 min — repetition, not new material.
Maintenance check on the bike (15 min, low energy).
Walk + voice memo to family — close the loop on yesterday's argument.

scenarios.title: Bayesian updating is the bridge from clinical diagnosis to marathon pacing to investing
scenarios.situation: A 24-year-old PG student in Bangalore moves through a week mixing Bayesian thesis work, a clinical rotation, marathon training, a Munger circle-of-competence reading, and an advisor demand for a falsifier.

week_inputs.thesis_work: Bayesian inference applied to clinical trial small-sample design.
week_inputs.clinical_rotation: Doctor explained risk stratification: pre-test probability → updated post-test.
week_inputs.marathon_training: 30 km run, heart-rate drift after hour 2. Coach said 'fuel inversely with effort'.
week_inputs.investing: Read about Munger's circle of competence. Skipped a hot crypto tip.
week_inputs.lab_meeting: Advisor: 'don't run another experiment till you've designed the falsifier.'

ai_synthesis.detected_pattern: Bayesian updating is the same mechanism behind clinical diagnosis, marathon pacing, and investing decisions.

cross_domain_solutions.solution: Carry prior probability of failure into every lab session, like a clinician.
Energy investment scales like compounding interest — small consistent deposits beat hero efforts.
Stay inside circle of competence == design the falsifier first.

questions_to_ask: What was your prior probability of the experiment working when you started?
What new evidence would shift you from 50/50 to 80/20?
Where in your week did you act outside your circle of competence?
priority_list: Design the falsifier (45 min, high energy)
Update the thesis Bayesian prior with the new clinical data (60 min)
Easy 5 km recovery run, fuel pre-loaded

scenarios.title: The blind corner, the day-7 churn cliff, and System 1 leadership are the same failure
scenarios.situation: A 28-year-old professional in Singapore moves through a week of a missed-quarter post-mortem, a sharp 1-on-1, a near-miss observation, a churn analysis epiphany, and a Kahneman re-read — and Invifescus reveals the same structural failure mode under all four.

week_inputs.monday_meeting: Q3 missed by 11%. Director blamed pipeline coverage.
week_inputs.tuesday_oneonone: Skip-level said 'you're solving the right problem the wrong week.'
week_inputs.wednesday_run: Saw 2 separate accidents on the same blind corner. Pattern.
week_inputs.thursday_call: Customer churn analysis showed onboarding day-7 is the cliff.
week_inputs.friday_book: Read Kahneman: System 1 dominates under stress.

ai_synthesis.detected_pattern: Repeated structural failure mode is the customer-onboarding cliff = the blind corner = the missed quarter.

cross_domain_solutions.solution: Build a 'warning sign' the way the city should build a mirror — invisible failure modes need explicit alerts.
Under stress, leadership defaults to blaming pipeline (System 1). System 2 asks: why is day-7 broken?

questions_to_ask: Which day-7 metric did you ignore three quarters in a row?
If you only had one team intervention this month, which removes the most invisible cliffs?
What's the 'mirror at the blind corner' for your customers?
priority_list: Boss decision: ship day-7 nudge sequence vs hire one more rep (Empiricum run)
Send skip-level the 'right problem, wrong week' acknowledgement
Pre-mortem next quarter at the team meeting

scenarios.title: Master 3 add 1 — across pitch, lifts, and dinners at home
scenarios.situation: A 32-year-old entrepreneur in Bangalore moves through investor feedback on a shifting story, an engineer flagging refactor #5, a gym coach demanding focus, a stoicism re-read, and his daughter asking why he's never home — and Invifescus sees the same failure mode across all four.

week_inputs.investor_call: Lead VC: 'your story changes every pitch.'
week_inputs.team_standup: Engineer flagged the 5th refactor in 6 weeks.
week_inputs.family: Daughter asked why he's never home for dinner.

ai_synthesis.detected_pattern: Same failure mode across pitch + product + parenting: changing the story too often, mastering nothing.

cross_domain_solutions.solution: Master 3 slides, add 1. Master 3 lifts, add 1. Master 3 dinners-a-week, add 1.

questions_to_ask: Which 3 things are you mastering? Which is the 4th you'll add this quarter?
What did you protect from change this week — and what did you let drift?
priority_list: Freeze the pitch deck for 30 days
Schedule 3 fixed dinners with daughter this week
End the refactor cycle: write the architecture freeze doc

scenarios.title: Abstraction in CS, negative space in art, what's NOT said in arguments — the same skill
scenarios.situation: A 16-year-old high-school student in Chennai walks through a CS abstraction class, a Discord argument, a YouTube get-rich rabbit hole, a mother checking on her new online friend, and an art-class negative-space lesson. Under-16 safety mode is active throughout.

week_inputs.online_argument: Got into a fight on a public Discord.
week_inputs.youtube_rabbithole: 3 hours on 'how to become rich at 16'.
week_inputs.parent_check: Mum asked who the new online friend was.

ai_synthesis.detected_pattern: Same skill in 3 fields — abstraction in CS, negative space in art, what's NOT said in arguments.

cross_domain_solutions.solution: What you remove is as important as what you include — applies to code, art, and replies.

questions_to_ask: What did you NOT say in the Discord fight that would have helped?
What did the YouTube video LEAVE OUT about getting rich at 16?
What negative space is in your school project?
priority_list: Show Mum the Discord — she + a moderator must approve next reply
Replace 1 hour of YouTube with art-class practice today
Apply negative space to your CS homework: remove 3 lines, see what breaks
